text: [{"thinking":"A newsletter subscription banner appears at the top of the flight results list, which was not present at the start of the segment.","type":"change_ui_state","time_start_ms":5000,"time_end_ms":5500,"description":"A 'SUBSCRIBE TO OUR NEWSLETTER' banner appears above the flight search results.","confidence":0.8,"frame_description":"Flight search results page with a new newsletter banner at the top."},{"thinking":"A countdown timer for the price guarantee appears in the top right corner of the page.","type":"change_ui_state","time_start_ms":7700,"time_end_ms":8000,"description":"A 'Booking Price Guarantee' countdown timer appears in the top right corner of the page.","confidence":0.8,"frame_description":"Flight search results page with a countdown timer visible in the top right."},{"thinking":"The user scrolls up the page, likely to reach the header and navigation elements.
